title: Dwell in Us
author: Francesca LaRosa
snippet: Drop down dew from above, you heavens, and let the clouds rain down the Just One; let the earth be opened and bring forth a Savior

title: Psalm 24
author: Ben Walther - SP2026
snippet: Let the Lord enter; he is king of glory.

title: Isaiah 7:14
author: Steve Angrisano - SP2026
snippet: Behold, a Virgin shall conceive and bear a son; and his name will be called Emmanuel.

title: A Place at Your Table
author: Ben Walther
snippet: Happy the ones whom you call here to dine, the saint and the sinner, your friends. Now reconciled in this banquet divine, the promise of life without end, the promise of life without end.

title: LR-13
author: Curtis Stephan - SP2026
snippet: Behold, a Virgin shall conceive and bear a son; and his name will be called Emmanuel.

title: Like a Child Rests
author: Christopher Walker
snippet: Like a child rests in its mother's arms, so will I rest in you.

title: The Memorare
author: Sarah Hart, Francesca LaRosa, St. Bernard
snippet: Remember, O most gracious Virgin Mary, that never was it known  that anyone who fled to thy protection,  implored thy help,  or sought thy intercession, was left unaided.  Inspired by this confidence I fly unto thee, O Virgin of virgins, my Mother. To thee do I come, before thee I stand, sinful and sorrowful. O Mother of the Word Incarnate, despise not my petitions, but in thy mercy hear and answer me. Amen.

title: Light Has Come
author: SUNO AI x Jim Ngo
snippet: Come Emmanuel, we wait for You, Hearts awake, Your promise true. Every voice will lift Your name, Forevermore, the King will reign.

author: Mass of St. Mary Magdalene - Sarah Hart
snippet: Lord, have mercy. Christ have mercy. Lord have mercy

author: Mass of St. Mary Magdalene - Sarah Hart
snippet: Glory to God! Glory to God in the highest, and on earth, peace to people of goodwill.

author: Mass of St. Mary Magdalene - Sarah Hart
snippet: Holy, holy, holy Lord God of hosts. Heaven and earth are full of your glory. Hosanna in the highest. Blessed is he who comes in the moment of the Lord. Hosanna in the highest.

author: Mass of St. Mary Magdalene - Sarah Hart
snippet: When we eat this bread and drink this cup, we proclaim your death, O Lord, until you come again.

author: Mass of St. Mary Magdalene - Sarah Hart
Mass of St. Mary Magdalene - Sarah Hart
snippet: Lamb of God, You take away the sins of the world; have mercy, have mercy on us.
